segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you heard they're finally updating the kitchen in the student lounge of this dormitory? It's about time. What are they doing? Well, for one, all of the appliances are being replaced. Oh, that's great. The microwave hasn't been working properly for a while. I heard they're replacing some of the cabinets too. I hope it doesn't take too long. I cook there a lot. Me too. I think we'll have access to the place in the dorm next door, though.
